top_signals.title: Toyota sales drop again in May as Iran conflict hits output
top_signals.summary: Toyota's global sales in May, including those of subsidiary Daihatsu, fell 7.4% from a year earlier to 885,207 units.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Baidu’s CFO on How It Became a Full-Stack AI Player
top_signals.summary: From Internet search to chips, LLMs, clouds, and self-driving cars.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Galaxy cuts CLARITY Act odds to 50% as Senate floor time narrows
top_signals.summary: Galaxy cut its 2026 CLARITY Act odds to 50%, warning that Senate floor time is running out before the August recess.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Doubtless Pet Care Launches to Provide Peace of Mind to Pet Parents and Help Their Pets Live Happier, Healthier Lives
top_signals.summary: Doubtless combines industry-leading pet insurance with innovative care solutions, protecting more than 6 million pets across 10 global markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Singer and actor Kazuya Kamenashi to marry Minami Tanaka
top_signals.summary: The pair added that Tanaka is pregnant with their first child.

top_signals.title: Sixth Street to Become Majority Shareholder of Monument Re
top_signals.summary: Sixth Street, a leading global investment firm, today announced that investment vehicles managed or advised by Sixth Street have entered into a definitive agreement to acquire a majority stake in Monument Re (“Monument” or the “Company”), a premier pan-European insurance consolidator, and support the Company’s long-term strategic growth plan.
